title: Bulldog Plush Toy, 50cm Stuffed Animal Throw Plushie Pillow Doll, Soft Fluffy Puppy Dog Hugging Cushion - Present for Every Age & Occasion
features: 🧸 THE PERFECT TEDDY FOR ALL AGES: This adorable Guess How Much I Love You soft toy is the perfect cuddly friend for your little one. Perfect for someone special, say I love you with this super soft dog
🧸 ENDLESS IMAGINATIVE ADVENTURES: Watch your little ones's faces light up as you bring their favorite story to life with this super soft dog plush.

🧸 COMFORTING TOY FOR YOUR LITTLE ONE: This toy dog is perfect for helping little ones feel soothed, safe and secure. Its softness is ideal for bedtime snuggles and providing comfort during turbulent times.
🧸 SOFT TOYS FOR GIRLS AND BOYS: This Guess How Much I Love You Dog is based on the timeless, children's classic book and is the perfect gift to express your love for the little ones in your life.

🧸 Perfect Gift for any Occasions: baby gift or a present for a toddler, a Christening, baby shower, the child attendant at a wedding or the sibling of a new arrival, a birthday or Christmas present. Also a great raffle prize for a charity or social event
description: Product description Bulldog stuff fluffy pillow adorable toys for kids and adults of all ages. This type measures 17" full from head to toe. Soft as cotton and ready to hug and cuddle Beautiful attractive face. He will spend time and pay attention to every moment of happiness and sadness of his owner. Listen to your whole story and keep it as secrets. A best friend always to a hug, Filled with the highest quality PP cotton and plush fabric, safe for kids and will quickly become your huggable friend and your child. It is so soft to touch and nice to hold. Everything is attached and stitched. There is nothing on the pillow that could be dangerous for the baby/child. So rest assured that it will be the perfect size for your child. Perfect gift for Birthday, Christmas and Holiday, Valentine. CUSTOMER SERVICE - With Spring Country, we provide the best customer service to our customers. Check our store for more products and other deals that are waiting for you. Purpose: plush toys, rag doll, cushions, home decoration, car decoration and gifts. Age: suitable and safe for all ages. Adorable and adorable animal toy, they have fat body, bright eyes and smile face. Fluffy body and fluffy head, they are so soft when you touch them. Our goal is to offer high quality products to our customers at an amazing price. . Tips 1. Deformation may occur in plush toys during transit. Shake it all and leave for a while to restore it. 2. Hand wash recommended: hand wash with cold soapy water. Gentle machine wash with cold water is ok. Air dry to restore fluffiness. Safety Warning For External use only, Avoid Contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat source
